## About the event

Beats on the lake presents: Shake the Lake 2026 - Matt Silliman, Brendon Lee & Curtis Roland

SHAKE THE LAKE IS BACK 🌊🛥️

Saturday, April 25

12PM–5PM

$60 tickets

Step aboard the Stardust for a 5-hour daytime escape on the water.

Top deck DJs. Party vibes below. Indoor dancefloor.

Rain or shine, we’re on.

This is not a dock party.

This is a floating dance floor.

LINEUP:

Matt Silliman

Brendon Lee

Curtis Roland

LOCATION / BOARDING:

Harbor Landing at Lake Lanier Islands

7650 Lanier Islands Pkwy, Buford, GA

WAIVER (DO THIS NOW):

[https://www.waiverfile.com/b/houseboatslakelanier/Waiver.aspx?formid=84f6bad2-1565-4c23-a9e9-3aab356f330a&id=d611360b-8062-4c43-b259-c8965912c7a3](https://www.waiverfile.com/b/houseboatslakelanier/Waiver.aspx?formid=84f6bad2-1565-4c23-a9e9-3aab356f330a&id=d611360b-8062-4c43-b259-c8965912c7a3)

DRINKS: BYOB (we’ll have vodka punch + options onboard)

FOOD: Light bites available

SET TIMES:

12–2 Curtis Roland

2–3:30 Brendon Lee

3:30–5 Matt Silliman

AFTER: Damon’s lake house to keep it rolling

Capacity is limited and this always sells out.

Get your tickets:

www.peerpop.io/events/shakethelakespring

Big love to ADG Motorsports for the support 🙏

Let’s make this one count. 🔥

Also check out other [Parties in Buford](https://allevents.in/buford-ga/parties "Parties in Buford"), [Entertainment events in Buford](https://allevents.in/buford-ga/entertainment "Entertainment events in Buford").

### Frequently Asked Questions About Beats on the lake presents: Shake the Lake 2026 - Matt Silliman, Brendon Lee & Curtis Roland

When and where is Beats on the lake presents: Shake the Lake 2026 - Matt Silliman, Brendon Lee & Curtis Roland being held?

**Beats on the lake presents: Shake the Lake 2026 - Matt Silliman, Brendon Lee & Curtis Roland** takes place on **Sat, 25 Apr, 2026 at 12:00 pm to Sat, 25 Apr, 2026 at 05:00 pm** at **Harbor Landing At Lake Lanier, Lake Lanier Islands Boat Rental, Buford, GA 30518, United States**.

Who is organizing Beats on the lake presents: Shake the Lake 2026 - Matt Silliman, Brendon Lee & Curtis Roland?

**Beats on the lake presents: Shake the Lake 2026 - Matt Silliman, Brendon Lee & Curtis Roland** is organized by **[Beats on the Lake](https://allevents.in/org/beats-on-the-lake/24347992?ref=event-page-faqs)**.

Who is this event for? Is it right for me?

**Beats on the lake presents: Shake the Lake 2026 - Matt Silliman, Brendon Lee & Curtis Roland** is ideal for **party-goers, social butterflies, and anyone looking for a great night out with music, drinks, and good vibes**. Whether you're a first-time attendee or a longtime enthusiast in Buford, this event is thoughtfully curated to deliver a standout experience worth every moment. With **130+ people** already showing interest, this is clearly an event worth adding to your calendar - don't miss out.
